ddls:
CREATE TABLE "intersections" (
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intersection */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the intersection */,
  "cross_street" TEXT /* Name of the cross street */,
  "intersection_name" TEXT /* Name of the intersection */,
  "location" TEXT /* Human-readable location description */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the intersection */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the intersection */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the intersection */,
  "intersection_type" TEXT /* Type of the intersection (e.g., 4-way, 3-way, Roundabout) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the intersection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the intersection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streets" (
  "street_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each street */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street */,
  "street_type" TEXT /* Type of the street (e.g., Ave, St, Rd) */,
  "length_miles" REAL /* Length of the street in miles */,
  "start_intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting intersection */,
  "end_intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending intersection */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit of the street */,
  "lanes" INTEGER /* Number of lanes on the street */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the street was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the street was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("street_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streets_end_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streets_start_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_lights" (
  "light_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic light */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection where the light is located */,
  "light_type" TEXT /* Type of the traffic light (e.g., Signal, Pedestrian) */,
  "light_status" TEXT /* Current status of the light (e.g., Red, Green, Yellow) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the light status was last updated */,
  "cycle_length" INTEGER /* Length of the traffic light cycle in seconds */,
  "green_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the green light in seconds */,
  "red_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the red light in seconds */,
  "yellow_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the yellow light in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the traffic light was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the traffic light was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("light_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_lights_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data entry */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection where the data was collected */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of traffic (number of vehicles per hour) */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles in miles per hour */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the traffic data (e.g., Camera, Sensor) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "traffic_condition" TEXT /* Current traffic condition (e.g., Free Flow, Congested, Jammed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the traffic data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the traffic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., Accident, Road Closure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the incident */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the report is associated with */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Police Report, Maintenance Report) */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Engineer, Analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout, View, Edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic camera */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection where the camera is installed */,
  "camera_type" TEXT /* Type of the camera (e.g., Fixed, Pan-Tilt-Zoom) */,
  "camera_status" TEXT /* Current status of the camera (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the camera status was last updated */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the camera (e.g., 1080p, 720p) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the traffic camera was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the traffic camera was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_cameras_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "camera_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video entry */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera the video is from */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video file */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the video footage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the video footage */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the camera video was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the camera video was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_camera_videos_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES traffic_cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pedestrian_data" (
  "pedestrian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pedestrian data entry */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection where the data was collected */,
  "pedestrian_count" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians detected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the pedestrian data (e.g., Camera, Sensor) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pedestrian data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pedestrian data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pedestrian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pedestrian_data_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public alert */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection where the alert is relevant */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., TrafficJam, Accident, RoadClosure) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the alert */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the public alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the public alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_alerts_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection where maintenance is scheduled */,
  "street_id" INTEGER /* ID of the street where maintenance is scheduled */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., Repaving, Signage, Lighting) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the maintenance (e.g., Scheduled, InProgress, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_street_id FOREIGN KEY ("street_id") REFERENCES streets ("street_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic pattern */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection where the pattern is observed */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (e.g., Morning, Afternoon, Evening) */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "average_traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Average traffic volume during the specified time and day */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles during the specified time and day */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the traffic pattern was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the traffic pattern was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_patterns_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident response */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the response is associated with */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of the response (e.g., Towing, Medical, Police) */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the response document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the response was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_responses_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public feedback */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection the feedback is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the public feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the public feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_feedback_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection the post is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "post_time" TEXT /* Date and time the post was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the social media post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the social media post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
